documents.topic: Clamping init from Int for Cardinal and Tagged Cardinal
rawValue → underlying rename — alignment with upstream Carrier rename
documents.statusDetail: Cohort-wide policy C1 (2026-05-09): Story 1 launches at the current rawValue shape; the rename is scheduled but unscoped for a future major version. The trivial-self-carrier shape (Cardinal.Underlying = Cardinal) is preserved across 0.x for cohort coherence.

documents.topic: Survey of stdlib APIs warranting typed-Cardinal overloads in Cardinal SLI; placement decision framework (protocol-level vs concrete-type) post-RRC-reserveCapacity precedent
documents.statusDetail: Tier-2 survey implemented across three tiers. Tier 1 (1fb2691): protocol-level overloads on RRC/BidirectionalCollection/Collection for removeFirst, removeLast, prefix, suffix, dropFirst, dropLast. Tier 2 (5098356): Set/Dictionary per-type overloads (reserveCapacity, init(minimumCapacity:)). Tier 3 (fbad738+15d2e1b): Array/ContiguousArray init(repeating:count:) and init(unsafeUninitializedCapacity:initializingWith:), String.init(repeating:count:). Dead Ends section REVISED — original 'per-type Array silently fails in ~Copyable Self extension' claim REFUTED; root cause was stale Package.resolved (see experiment copyable-self-cardinal-resolution).
